notes.purpose: Prototype-tier serious run target: Llama-3.1-8B + QLoRA on a single A100 using the cleaned multi-source Stage 1 corpus.
notes.hardware: Tuned for 1x A100 40GB (or 80GB). bf16 requires Ampere or newer; A100 qualifies.
notes.throughput_tuning: A100-only micro-batch tuning: per_device_train_batch_size=4 with gradient_accumulation_steps=4 keeps the same effective update batch as batch=1/accum=16 while using more VRAM and reducing accumulation overhead. Do not copy these values into the Kaggle T4x2 config.
notes.gate: Requires HF access to meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B and a real Stage-1 manifest/token report passing strict checks.
notes.checkpoint_cadence: Saves every 100 optimizer steps and delays first eval until step 500 so checkpoint-100 exists before eval can fail.
notes.eval_memory: Eval is loss-only with per-device eval batch 1 and eval_accumulation_steps 1 to avoid retaining large Llama logits during checkpoint-adjacent eval.
notes.path_note: Paths are config-relative (relative to this file's directory). Run from anywhere: python -m llm_hawaii.train --config code/configs/llama31_8b_a100.json
notes.train_data_note: stage1.jsonl.gz is the cleaned, train-only multi-source Stage 1 corpus: 81117 rows, ~44.1M whitespace tokens, FineWeb-2 + hawwiki + hawwikisource, prototype_only=True. Off-git under data/.
notes.eval_data_note: dev.jsonl is 621 rows from FineWeb-2 haw_Latn dev split (prototype_only=True, release_eligible=False). Eval-during-train wired when eval_steps non-null and eval_path set.
